title: About
text:
I am Clara and I am a first year master of Health Data Science student at the University of Michigan! In my free time I enjoy knitting. 
I also love to be outdoors, hike, try good new foods and travel (especially when I can do all at once) 
I am a pretty avid runner. I am “training” for my fourth marathon that is coming up at the beginning of May in Prague. However, I am currently dealing with injury so my running is on pause. My most recent marathon was in Ann Arbor (see how I did here)

title: Clara’s Website
text:
About Me
Hi! I’m Clara, a senior studying Information Analysis with an interest in health data science.
I enjoy working with data, especially in healthcare contexts, and I’m passionate about using analytics to improve patient outcomes.

title: My Interests
text: Hi! I’m Clara, a first-year Master’s student in Health Data Science at the University of Michigan.

title: My Interests
text:
Knitting
In my free time, I love knitting—it’s one of my favorite ways to relax and unwind.

title: My Interests
text:
Travel
I also love being outdoors—especially hiking, trying new foods, and traveling (even better when I can do all three at once!).

title: My Interests
text:
Running
I’m an avid runner and currently “training” for my fourth marathon, coming up in early May in Prague.
Right now, I’m dealing with an injury, so running is on pause—but I’m hoping to be back soon.
My most recent marathon was in Ann Arbor—check out my results here.
